description: Slip into these id slip-ons and enjoy comfort at its best. The full grain leather upper lends it a classy shine to the shoes, while the foamy footbed offers a light, comfy rideall day.UpperFull grain multi-layered leather upper for maximum durability and styleTapered toe for comfort and stylePerforations on the forefoot areaLightly padded tongue and collar for a great snug FitConcealed elastic gores for a cutomised fitSlip-on system for ease of wearStitch detailing to enhance shoe lifeMidsoleFull length EVA midsole for comfort and supportCushioned footbed for added comfortOutsoleLightweight, slip-resistant textured rubber outsole for better shock absorptionFlex grooves on the outsole to facilitate flexible movement of the feetShoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
